title: Conduct a subtidal marine monitoring operation from a vessel or platform
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct a subtidal marine monitoring operation from a vessel or platform demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.
